canonical_definition: Long Range Arena (LRA), a pioneering benchmark for long context modeling with tasks ranging from 1k to 16k tokens.
papers: BABILong: Testing the Limits of LLMs with Long Context Reasoning-in-a-Haystack
Megalodon: Efficient LLM Pretraining and Inference with Unlimited Context Length
